.gitignore.general_idea: Add node_modules to .gitignore to exclude frontend dependencies from version control.
Add .yarn to .gitignore to exclude Yarn cache/directory from version control.
Add .bit to .gitignore to exclude Bit component cache from version control.
Move target/ to .gitignore to exclude Maven build output from version control.
Remove /node from .gitignore as it is no longer needed or relevant.
Remove pom.xml.tag from .gitignore to allow tracking of Maven release tags if needed.
Remove pom.xml.releaseBackup from .gitignore to allow tracking of Maven release backups if needed.
Remove pom.xml.versionsBackup from .gitignore to allow tracking of Maven versions backups if needed.
Remove release.properties from .gitignore to allow tracking of Maven release properties if needed.

Makefile.general_idea: Refactor Makefile to support a multi-module project structure with separate api, frontend, and library directories.
Makefile.after:
dev-api:
	cd api && mvn compile quarkus:dev

Makefile.general_idea: Add specific targets for building, testing, and running the API module.
Makefile.after:
test-api:
	cd api && mvn clean test -DskipITs

start-api:
	java -jar api/target/quarkus-app/quarkus-run.jar

it-api:
	cd api && mvn clean verify

build-api:
	cd api && mvn clean install -DskipTests

Makefile.general_idea: Add Docker build target for the API module.
Makefile.after:
docker-build-api:
	cd api && docker build -f src/main/docker/Dockerfile.multistage -t quay.io/quarkus/code-quarkus-api .

Makefile.general_idea: Add targets for building, testing, and managing the library module.
Makefile.after:
build-lib:
	cd library && yarn && yarn build

test-lib:
	cd library && yarn test

tag-lib:
	cd library && yarn run tag

Makefile.general_idea: Add targets to link and unlink the local library with the frontend.
Update the main dev target to run the API module in dev mode.
Add targets for building, testing, and running the frontend module.
Makefile.after:
test-frontend:
	cd frontend && yarn && yarn test

build-frontend:
	cd frontend && yarn && yarn build

start-frontend:
	cd frontend && yarn run run

Makefile.general_idea: Add Docker build target for the frontend module.
Makefile.after:
docker-build-frontend:
	cd frontend && docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.multistage -t quay.io/quarkus/code-quarkus-frontend .

Makefile.general_idea: Add target to run services via docker-compose.
Add target to deploy to OpenShift.
Remove obsolete targets related to the old single-module structure and unused features.
Makefile.before:
clean:
	mvn clean

clean-backend-only:
	mvn clean -Pbackend-only

native:
	mvn package -Pnative -DskipTests

ext-add:
	mvn quarkus:add-extension -Dextensions="$(ID)"

ext-list:
	mvn quarkus:list-extensions

build_deploy.sh.general_idea: Refactor the build script to delegate execution to sub-project scripts instead of building a single monolithic Docker image.
Add a guard clause to skip execution if the current commit message indicates a dependency bump.
